title: Want It Any Other Way
description: Exploring romantic tension and past relationships.
lyrics: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah Motherfucker, I feel it when I come in the room All that magic in me, baby, yeah Can you feel it when I come in the room? I know you're sweatin', lookin' at me as I come flyin' Give you more than you bargained, baby, you Lookin' like a little bit of my next mistake, yeah But then you, you stop and you look at me And my anxiety goes to the roof I seen you before, it's you from another time Maybe another life, let's get down You always stressin' me from the past, ay You are always makin' me want more, I can't let go And then I know you gon' hit me and then so I see you do the love to another person I met before But your body's got me beggin' for more, oh Yeah, baby, you got me feelin' like I never felt before Got me wantin' your ass on the floor now, baby, ooh Just move with me and love me more Cause you're never lazy again I know you just got me fucked up Straight actin' like me and you don't really love Come make love to me, yeah I know you got me fucked up Couldn't have been somebody new You're the same bitch I knew from before, blue I can't be there with you There's no way you want me to We go, oh, this town and us I can't come to you again I won't let the fuck fuck with you again Baby, you never Cause I just don't smoke a lot I'm just fuckin' excited, come and fuck me up You're lookin' too good to hide Why you lookin' so fuckin' hot? Makes me wanna forgive you for everything you've fucked up in my life Oh, come back, baby, never say you're too good Just say goodbye to the past, it's like I don't know if it lasts I don't know if it goes I don't know about nothin' but that But tonight, y'all, this is how we roll Fuck my anxieties, fuck your past Fuck what we did to make each other go whack Let's get down One more time, just for us, in the name of love Love, love, love, love Get down, baby, with me In the name of love One, two, three, four, uh, in the door Out the door, rippin' your clothes off And I see your flip-flop Round up all the water Pull your hair up, put it all the way in you And you don't want it any other way And I don't want it any other way, way, way Baby, I don't want it any other way, oh
